introduction: I bring operational attention and technical problem-solving together, with a focus on dependable application support and useful improvements.
evidence: My work draws on Python, SQL, automation, and technical delivery to investigate issues, reduce repetition, and communicate practical solutions.

focusAreas.title: Operational Support
focusAreas.description: Investigating issues methodically and helping keep workflows dependable for the people who use them.

focusAreas.title: Automation and Data
focusAreas.description: Using Python and SQL to understand recurring tasks and shape clearer, more consistent ways of working.

focusAreas.title: Technical Delivery
focusAreas.description: Turning requirements and support needs into maintainable application improvements and clear communication.
